creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks.  I updated the port to 2.2.0.  BTW, please 
talk to the ksetiwatch people and ask them to update their 
configure magic so we can use the LIBQT environment variable 
to specify an overriding -lqt2.  For now, I moved your patches 
to fix this to perl regexes in the Makefile.
